note: Back-translations (TartuNLP <locale>->en) for QA review of fuzzy-flagged .po entries written by tools/translate_po.py. Where a back-translation diverges materially from the English msgid, a native speaker should review the .po entry directly (it carries the #, fuzzy flag) rather than editing this file.
engine: TartuNLP / Neurotõlge, University of Tartu — https://api.tartunlp.ai/translation/v2

et_back.Pick a return type and a period, then ge: Choose the return type and period, then generate: KMD is calculated from the posted ledger, TSD from the final pay runs of this month (the empty month produces a valid nil declaration). Both download the e-MTA as a upload file that has ever been generated.
et_back.Generate a KMD or TSD above to get start: Generate KMD or TSD above to get started.

ru_back.Pick a return type and a period, then ge: Choose the type of feedback and the period, then generate: KMD is calculated from the book posted, TSD is calculated from the final salary for this month (an empty month gives a valid zero declaration). Both options are uploaded as an e-MTA file when created.
ru_back.Generate a KMD or TSD above to get start: Create KMD or TSD above first.
